TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == Cin-men a sakuwan nu Cung-huwa-min-kow Bu-cyen sakuwan a kuwan, tini i Syamin-wan-cyu-lung-cyang a sacumud u Cin-men subal, Lye subal. Ta-tan, Al-tan hatini 12 a subal a nikasaupu, a mikutay mikuwan tu Pu-tyen a kuwan tungus nu U-ciw, labu nu sakuwan iza ku tulu a tukay 3 ku niyazu', zuma a kuwan mikuwan atu satabakiay a tukuy u Cin-cen a niyazi'. i Cung-hwa min-kow a hulican, tungus nu Taywan a kakitizaan. . nilaculan likisi ś≠∑ŚŹ≤ ayaw nu yen-caw ŚÖÉśúĚšĽ•ŚČć Cin-men sumamaxd a kamu "U-cow" han, Layal zku pilungad malingatu i Cin ziday, Cung-yen ku katuuday, milaliway nu nanmi katukuh i U-coway izaw ku Su, Cen, U, Cay, Li, Yen enem a nganganan, Cin-men a tademaw, tatenga' namakayni malingatu. kahulaman yen a mihcaan "1912 a m ihcaan 4 a bulad 18 a dem iad, Sya-men cenbu milihiza tu sakaput a situngus pazayza Bu-cyen tu-tu-bu misalunguc a pasulil, Sya-men atu Cin-men mapulung maka Tung-an kuwan misateked tu "s-min kuwan" saca uyni a mihca 9 a bulad 18 a demiad s-min kuwan muliyaw macakat tu "s-min-bu" katukuh kahulaman 2 a mihcaan "1913 a mihcaan " 3 a bulad 30 a demiad alesen aca ku vcebu misumad panukas "s-min kuwan". kahulaman 26 a mihcaan "1937 a mihcaan mikaliang tu kalalaisan hitay nu Lipun mihaka tu Sya-men malalais, milais tu Cin-men. 1937 a mihca 9 a bulad 3 a demkad, Lipun nu kaygung malingatu hikuki atu bakudang tu Sya-men. . talaayaway kawaw nu hitay a ziday ŤĽćšļčŚČćÁ∑öśôāšĽ£ kahulaman 34 a mih "1945 a mihcaan "sakatusa nu tabakiay kalalais nu kitakit pahezek zikuz, Cong-hwa-min-kow miala tu Cin-men, patizeng tu tusa tukay sepat ninazu', kahulaman 35 a mihcaan "1943 a mihcaan pasumaden tu tusa tukuy tusa niyazu'. kahulaman tu 37 a mihcaan "1948 a mihcaan" 12 a bulad 10 a demiad, Cung-tung Cyang-cong-cen pasakamu mitulun tu sakedec tu hamin a kanatal, Cin-men a kawan u kakedecan a kitizaan. kilul tu tu tusa a kanatal kapah ku ni kacayacayat, cunus tu kasa kitakit tu niedap mihulak tu aedes nu Cn-men, kahulaman 81 a mihcaan "1992 a mihcaan" 11 a bulad 7 a de miad, kow-bang-pu musakamu Cin-men a kuwan mihulak panunul tu sapikaedes, tatenga' pahezek katukuh tu 43 a mihcaan tu katenes nu kaedes. Kahulaman 84 a mihcaan "1995 a mihcaan 10 a bulad 18 a demiad, patizeng tu "Cin-men kanatal aidangan", nu Coeng hwa min-kow sakaenem nu kanatal aidangan, nu saayaway kakitizaan nu Cin-mena kanatal aidangan, u saayaway anidiput tu likisi a lalangawan anilacul, angangan pikining tu kalalaisan, u sitahakay a sakasilaculan nu kanatal aidangan. " . Kahulaman tu 85 a mihcaan "1996 a mihcaan" 1 a bulad 15 a demiad, Bu-cyen a kuwan cenbu malimad i Cin-men a kuwan pikawawan, nika kuwan a cenbu mahiza tu misakapah misulit. Kahulaman 90 a mihcaan "2001 a mihcaan" "2001 a mihcaan" 2 a bulad 3 a demkiad, malingatu pabalunga ku Cin-men Sya-min, malingatu "syaw-san-tung". Cin-men u bayu a subal, tungus adidi'ay a subal nu mauzipay. zayhan matabal malungad ku Cin-men, saca kinapinapina ku nikalalais, tabakiay nu umahay a aadupan sakasilacul caay kayadah, angangan a lamangan u sumilaway a kung-cye ku angangan, u kalihanawan tu a malawpes u kasatiman anu micucuay aadupan nu Ow-ya suy-ta atu u sumamaday mauzipay ba'tu "hu" atu win-cang buting" u kasatimad. . Cin-men u kalimadan katayzaan nu talastas a ayam, nu sayadahan ayam a lamangan, paymihcaan tu balangbangan tu kasienawan sabeleng sa ku talastas a ayam tayni tu kasienawan, masacidekay aazihan, Cin-men a kuwan hina maazih ku papidangay tu ayam tungusa u tay-sen, uyni a ayam patin han Cin-men buyu'y ayam sye-huy huy ayam atu Cin-men piidangan a basu nu balemeday a tuud. 2013 a mihcaan malingatu, Sya-min Taten subalan micunus misanga' tut ukus, milakuit miubi tu liken nu bayu, Cin-men tukusa kanatal a lala' malawpes tu, sumamaday a nazipaan, bukubu anisanga'an mapeci' tu, dadipasan pihaceng matatiku ku kaeluc. uyza u kahenulan ku kawaw nu hitay, subal makedecay tu a palahad. Katukuh 2003 a hucaan Cin-men kya patayni tu Cong-kow-ta-lu Bu-cyen papiidang tu labang. ayza, ciniza sa nu Taywan pihibangan tu pilipayan katayzaan nu miliwkuay a labang, tu masatezep ku niyazu', malimanay nipatizang atu likelikenan nu bayu a singangan. Cong-kow-ta-lu atu Taywan nu miliwkuay a sakaput caay kayadah ku nipalawpes tu demiad taneng tu maliwku kuyni a subal, namahiza i pabalunga atu pahukukian misaliyut, mala u Cong-kow-ta-lu atu Taywan alaed nu teban akatayzaan. Cin-men hamina a kakitizaan masa Cin-men kanatal aidangan, bahal sapaayaw tu kawaw nu hitay atu patizeng, likisi muenengay a tademaw atu hekal aazihan. 2014 a hihcaan Cin-men atu Cong-kow-ta-lu a Bu-cyen kuwanan a basu u sakayadahay a niculu' tu tadenaw, pakala tu 150 emang ku tademaw. makay 2015 a mihca 1 a bulad 1 a demiad malingatu, Cong-kow-ta-lu tayzaay I Cin-men Pung-bu, Ma-cu subal nu miliwkuay caay tu paliayaw misang'a tu sakatahkal a minkiw. mabedlih, kapah katukuh itiza misinsi kuheni, palawpes tu kalisiw 600. katukuh 2016 a mihcaan, tusa ku sasanga'an siyamu palaayaw micuduh palahad tu miliwkuay. pasu cacay cayaynay panganganenay u-sin-ci pihibangan ciw-tyen, uyni a ciw-tyen nu Sya-men hang-ti-can milungaday nu misiwbayay, Sya-men-hwa-ten sakaput cung-cay ci U-yu-hwa ku mikitinay, uyni Cong-kow-ta-lu a kusi saayaway kapah amikanum tu ciw-tyen nu Taywan. Cin-men unipisanga' tu kaw-lyang asingangan, kaw-lyang a epah calap tu Taywan patiyamay a kulisiw iza ku 75%, u saicelangay a kyesaya cukel nu Cin-men, kalukan, mibutingay a kawaw atu pakutinay a kawaw hatini ku nu laylay a salacul amadiput tu atu masakapah. Cin-men iza kukapahay a pibutinga nu hekal, zayhan u tahakay cayay kapauning nu malikutay a bayu. Cin-men misa nga' aca tu micidekay nu Cin-men1 a saytu, u sapisanga' makayzaay i Cong-kow-ta-lu a tademaw tu nihulakan a hitay I 1958-1978 a mihcaan u nipatahkalantu bakinang a kuki'. 2015 a mihcaan 5 a bulad 23 a demiad katukuh 24 a demiad, u Cin-men paini pabeli tu tayniay nu mizizaway nu icuwacuwaay nu situngusay ci-zen-ci Cang-ce-cyun tu cacay a takini', mahizaay u tusaay a kanatal tu kakapah lihalay. . malalitineng tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan

tar~…ĺastas a ajam tajni tu kasi…ônawan, masa ¶id…ôkaj aazińßan, ¶in-m…ôn a kuwan ńßina maazińß ku papidaŇčaj tu ajam tuŇčusa u taj-s…ôn, ujni a ajam patin ńßan ¶in-m…ôn buju Ē~ °j ajam sj…ô-ńßuj ńßuj pir~…ĺipajan katajzaan nu mir~…ĺiwkuaj a r~…ĺabaŇč, tu masat…ôz…ôp ku nijazu Ē~ °, mar~…ĺimanaj nipatizaŇč atu r~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺik…ônan nu baju a siŇčaŇčan. ¶oŇč-kow-ta-r~…ĺu atu tajwan nu mir~…ĺiwkuaj a sakaput ¶aaj kajadańß ku nipar~…ĺawp…ôs tu d…ômiad tan…ôŇč tu mar~…ĺiwku kujni a subar~…ĺ, namańßiza i pabar~…ĺuŇča atu pańßukukian misar~…ĺijut, mar~…ĺa u ¶oŇč-kow-ta-r~…ĺu atu tajwan ar~…ĺa…ôd nu t…ôban akatajzaan. ¶in-m…ôn ńßamina a kakitizaan masa ¶in-m…ôn kanatar~…ĺ aidaŇčan, bańßar~…ĺ sapaajaw tu kawaw nu ńßitaj atu patiz…ôŇč, r~…ĺikisi mu…ôn…ôŇčaj a tad…ômaw atu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ aazińßan. **** a ńßińß ¶aan ¶in-m…ôn atu ¶oŇč-kow-ta-r~…ĺu a bu- ¶j…ôn kuwanan a basu u sakajadańßaj a ni ¶ur~…ĺu Ē~ ° tu tad…ônaw, pakar~…ĺa tu *** …ômaŇč ku tad…ômaw. makaj **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad mar~…ĺiŇčatu, ¶oŇč-kow-ta-r~…ĺu tajzaaj i ¶in-m…ôn puŇč-bu, ma- ¶u subar~…ĺ nu mir~…ĺiwkuaj ¶aaj tu par~…ĺiajaw misaŇč Ē~ °a tu sakatańßkar~…ĺ a minkiw. mab…ôdr~…ĺińß, kapańß katukuńß itiza misinsi kuńß…ôni, par~…ĺawp…ôs tu kar~…ĺisiw ***. katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan, tusa ku sasaŇča Ē~ °an sijamu par~…ĺaajaw mi ¶uduńß par~…ĺańßad tu mir~…ĺiwkuaj. pasu ¶a ¶aj ¶ajajnaj paŇčaŇčan…ônaj u-sin- ¶i pińßibaŇčan ¶iw-tj…ôn, ujni a ¶iw-tj…ôn nu sja-m…ôn ńßaŇč-ti- ¶an mir~…ĺuŇčadaj nu misiwbajaj, sja-m…ôn-ńßwa-t…ôn sakaput ¶uŇč- ¶aj ¶i u-ju-ńßwa ku mikitinaj, ujni ¶oŇč-kow-ta-r~…ĺu a kusi saajawaj kapańß amikanum tu ¶iw-tj…ôn nu tajwan. ¶in-m…ôn unipisaŇča Ē~ ° tu kaw-r~…ĺjaŇč asiŇčaŇčan, kaw-r~…ĺjaŇč a …ôpańß ¶ar~…ĺap tu tajwan patijamaj a kur~…ĺisiw iza ku **%, u sai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj a kj…ôsaja ¶uk…ôr~…ĺ nu ¶in-m…ôn, kar~…ĺukan, mibutiŇčaj a kawaw atu pakutinaj a kawaw ńßatini ku nu r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj a sar~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ amadiput tu atu masakapańß. ¶in-m…ôn iza kukapańßaj a pibutiŇča nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ, zajńßan u tańßakaj ¶ajaj kapauniŇč nu mar~…ĺikutaj a baju. ¶in-m…ôn misa Ňča Ē~ ° a ¶a tu mi ¶id…ôkaj nu ¶in-m…ôn* a sajtu, u sapisaŇča Ē~ ° makajzaaj i ¶oŇč-kow-ta-r~…ĺu a tad…ômaw tu nińßur~…ĺakan a ńßitaj i ****-**** a mińß ¶aan u nipatańßkar~…ĺantu bakinaŇč a kuki Ē~ °. **** a mińß ¶aan * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad katukuńß ** a d…ômiad, u ¶in-m…ôn paini pab…ôr~…ĺi tu tajniaj nu mizizawaj nu i ¶uwa ¶uwaaj nu situŇčusaj ¶i-z…ôn- ¶i ¶aŇč- ¶…ô- ¶jun tu ¶a ¶aj a takini Ē~ °, mańßizaaj u tusaaj a kanatar~…ĺ tu kakapańß r~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj. . mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin…ôŇč tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
S.FORM: == kakiliman == Cin-men a sakuwan nu Cung-huwa-min-kow Bu-cyen sakuwan a kuwan, tini i Syamin-wan-cyu-lung-cyang a sacumud u Cin-men subal, Lye subal. Ta-tan, Al-tan hatini 12 a subal a nikasaupu, a mikutay mikuwan tu Pu-tyen a kuwan tungus nu U-ciw, labu nu sakuwan iza ku tulu a tukay 3 ku niyazu', zuma a kuwan mikuwan atu satabakiay a tukuy u Cin-cen a niyazi'. i Cung-hwa min-kow a hulican, tungus nu Taywan a kakitizaan. . nilaculan likisi ś≠∑ŚŹ≤ ayaw nu yen-caw ŚÖÉśúĚšĽ•ŚČć Cin-men sumamaxd a kamu "U-cow" han, Layal zku pilungad malingatu i Cin ziday, Cung-yen ku katuuday, milaliway nu nanmi katukuh i U-coway izaw ku Su, Cen, U, Cay, Li, Yen enem a nganganan, Cin-men a tademaw, tatenga' namakayni malingatu. kahulaman yen a mihcaan "1912 a m ihcaan 4 a bulad 18 a dem iad, Sya-men cenbu milihiza tu sakaput a situngus pazayza Bu-cyen tu-tu-bu misalunguc a pasulil, Sya-men atu Cin-men mapulung maka Tung-an kuwan misateked tu "s-min kuwan" saca uyni a mihca 9 a bulad 18 a demiad s-min kuwan muliyaw macakat tu "s-min-bu" katukuh kahulaman 2 a mihcaan "1913 a mihcaan " 3 a bulad 30 a demiad alesen aca ku vcebu misumad panukas "s-min kuwan". kahulaman 26 a mihcaan "1937 a mihcaan mikaliang tu kalalaisan hitay nu Lipun mihaka tu Sya-men malalais, milais tu Cin-men. 1937 a mihca 9 a bulad 3 a demkad, Lipun nu kaygung malingatu hikuki atu bakudang tu Sya-men. . talaayaway kawaw nu hitay a ziday ŤĽćšļčŚČćÁ∑öśôāšĽ£ kahulaman 34 a mih "1945 a mihcaan "sakatusa nu tabakiay kalalais nu kitakit pahezek zikuz, Cong-hwa-min-kow miala tu Cin-men, patizeng tu tusa tukay sepat ninazu', kahulaman 35 a mihcaan "1943 a mihcaan pasumaden tu tusa tukuy tusa niyazu'. kahulaman tu 37 a mihcaan "1948 a mihcaan" 12 a bulad 10 a demiad, Cung-tung Cyang-cong-cen pasakamu mitulun tu sakedec tu hamin a kanatal, Cin-men a kawan u kakedecan a kitizaan. kilul tu tu tusa a kanatal kapah ku ni kacayacayat, cunus tu kasa kitakit tu niedap mihulak tu aedes nu Cn-men, kahulaman 81 a mihcaan "1992 a mihcaan" 11 a bulad 7 a de miad, kow-bang-pu musakamu Cin-men a kuwan mihulak panunul tu sapikaedes, tatenga' pahezek katukuh tu 43 a mihcaan tu katenes nu kaedes. Kahulaman 84 a mihcaan "1995 a mihcaan 10 a bulad 18 a demiad, patizeng tu "Cin-men kanatal aidangan", nu Coeng hwa min-kow sakaenem nu kanatal aidangan, nu saayaway kakitizaan nu Cin-mena kanatal aidangan, u saayaway anidiput tu likisi a lalangawan anilacul, angangan pikining tu kalalaisan, u sitahakay a sakasilaculan nu kanatal aidangan. " . Kahulaman tu 85 a mihcaan "1996 a mihcaan" 1 a bulad 15 a demiad, Bu-cyen a kuwan cenbu malimad i Cin-men a kuwan pikawawan, nika kuwan a cenbu mahiza tu misakapah misulit. Kahulaman 90 a mihcaan "2001 a mihcaan" "2001 a mihcaan" 2 a bulad 3 a demkiad, malingatu pabalunga ku Cin-men Sya-min, malingatu "syaw-san-tung". Cin-men u bayu a subal, tungus adidi'ay a subal nu mauzipay. zayhan matabal malungad ku Cin-men, saca kinapinapina ku nikalalais, tabakiay nu umahay a aadupan sakasilacul caay kayadah, angangan a lamangan u sumilaway a kung-cye ku angangan, u kalihanawan tu a malawpes u kasatiman anu micucuay aadupan nu Ow-ya suy-ta atu u sumamaday mauzipay ba'tu "hu" atu win-cang buting" u kasatimad. . Cin-men u kalimadan katayzaan nu talastas a ayam, nu sayadahan ayam a lamangan, paymihcaan tu balangbangan tu kasienawan sabeleng sa ku talastas a ayam tayni tu kasienawan, masacidekay aazihan, Cin-men a kuwan hina maazih ku papidangay tu ayam tungusa u tay-sen, uyni a ayam patin han Cin-men buyu'y ayam sye-huy huy ayam atu Cin-men piidangan a basu nu balemeday a tuud. 2013 a mihcaan malingatu, Sya-min Taten subalan micunus misanga' tut ukus, milakuit miubi tu liken nu bayu, Cin-men tukusa kanatal a lala' malawpes tu, sumamaday a nazipaan, bukubu anisanga'an mapeci' tu, dadipasan pihaceng matatiku ku kaeluc. uyza u kahenulan ku kawaw nu hitay, subal makedecay tu a palahad. Katukuh 2003 a hucaan Cin-men kya patayni tu Cong-kow-ta-lu Bu-cyen papiidang tu labang. ayza, ciniza sa nu Taywan pihibangan tu pilipayan katayzaan nu miliwkuay a labang, tu masatezep ku niyazu', malimanay nipatizang atu likelikenan nu bayu a singangan. Cong-kow-ta-lu atu Taywan nu miliwkuay a sakaput caay kayadah ku nipalawpes tu demiad taneng tu maliwku kuyni a subal, namahiza i pabalunga atu pahukukian misaliyut, mala u Cong-kow-ta-lu atu Taywan alaed nu teban akatayzaan. Cin-men hamina a kakitizaan masa Cin-men kanatal aidangan, bahal sapaayaw tu kawaw nu hitay atu patizeng, likisi muenengay a tademaw atu hekal aazihan. 2014 a hihcaan Cin-men atu Cong-kow-ta-lu a Bu-cyen kuwanan a basu u sakayadahay a niculu' tu tadenaw, pakala tu 150 emang ku tademaw. makay 2015 a mihca 1 a bulad 1 a demiad malingatu, Cong-kow-ta-lu tayzaay I Cin-men Pung-bu, Ma-cu subal nu miliwkuay caay tu paliayaw misang'a tu sakatahkal a minkiw. mabedlih, kapah katukuh itiza misinsi kuheni, palawpes tu kalisiw 600. katukuh 2016 a mihcaan, tusa ku sasanga'an siyamu palaayaw micuduh palahad tu miliwkuay. pasu cacay cayaynay panganganenay u-sin-ci pihibangan ciw-tyen, uyni a ciw-tyen nu Sya-men hang-ti-can milungaday nu misiwbayay, Sya-men-hwa-ten sakaput cung-cay ci U-yu-hwa ku mikitinay, uyni Cong-kow-ta-lu a kusi saayaway kapah amikanum tu ciw-tyen nu Taywan. Cin-men unipisanga' tu kaw-lyang asingangan, kaw-lyang a epah calap tu Taywan patiyamay a kulisiw iza ku 75%, u saicelangay a kyesaya cukel nu Cin-men, kalukan, mibutingay a kawaw atu pakutinay a kawaw hatini ku nu laylay a salacul amadiput tu atu masakapah. Cin-men iza kukapahay a pibutinga nu hekal, zayhan u tahakay cayay kapauning nu malikutay a bayu. Cin-men misa nga' aca tu micidekay nu Cin-men1 a saytu, u sapisanga' makayzaay i Cong-kow-ta-lu a tademaw tu nihulakan a hitay I 1958-1978 a mihcaan u nipatahkalantu bakinang a kuki'. 2015 a mihcaan 5 a bulad 23 a demiad katukuh 24 a demiad, u Cin-men paini pabeli tu tayniay nu mizizaway nu icuwacuwaay nu situngusay ci-zen-ci Cang-ce-cyun tu cacay a takini', mahizaay u tusaay a kanatal tu kakapah lihalay. . malalitineng tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan
